# Copilot Skills

Reusable domain workflows extracted from legacy Claude commands.

Skills:
- `spring-feature-scaffold`: feature scaffolding order and constraints.
- `spring-testing-strategy`: unit/integration testing strategy by layer.
- `code-review`: project-specific PR review checklist and output format.

Prompt entrypoints in `.github/prompts` should stay short and rely on these skills for deep guidance.
